message:
Add shape inference tests and CI validation artifacts

The tracing subsystem gains ~223 lines of new shape inference unit
tests covering rev, squeeze, select, dynamic_slice, dynamic_update_slice,
pad, gather, scatter, sort, and top_k primitives. Each test validates
output shape and dtype preservation through the SimpleTraceContext
pipeline with forensic logging via run_logged_test.

CI validation artifacts capture results from feature-parity validation,
README validation, threat-model review, and the V1 parity report,
providing auditable evidence of gate passage.

- crates/fj-trace/src/lib.rs: +223 lines of shape inference tests
  for 9 additional primitives (rev, squeeze, select, dynamic_slice,
  dynamic_update_slice, pad, gather, scatter, sort, top_k)
- artifacts/ci/runs/: feature-parity, readme, threat-model result.json
- artifacts/ci/runs/v1-parity-report/parity_report.v1.json
- artifacts/testing/logs/evidence/feature-parity-validation.result.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
